section_name: County or city authorized to adopt ordinance to allow low emission and energy-efficient vehicles to travel in designated lane in planned community.
text:
(1) A county or city may adopt an ordinance to allow low emission and energy-efficient vehicles to travel in a designated lane on streets within a planned community.

(2) As used in this section:

(a) “Low emission and energy-efficient vehicle” has the meaning ascribed to it in 23 U.S.C. § 166(f)(3) except that the term includes golf carts.

(b) “Planned community” has the meaning ascribed to it in NRS 116.075 .
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 484A
##### § 484A.467 — County or city authorized to adopt ordinance to allow low emission and energy-efficient vehicles to travel in designated lane in planned community.

(1) A county or city may adopt an ordinance to allow low emission and energy-efficient vehicles to travel in a designated lane on streets within a planned community.

(2) As used in this section:

    (a) “Low emission and energy-efficient vehicle” has the meaning ascribed to it in 23 U.S.C. § 166(f)(3) except that the term includes golf carts.

    (b) “Planned community” has the meaning ascribed to it in NRS 116.075 .

subsections.text: A county or city may adopt an ordinance to allow low emission and energy-efficient vehicles to travel in a designated lane on streets within a planned community.

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: “Low emission and energy-efficient vehicle” has the meaning ascribed to it in 23 U.S.C. § 166(f)(3) except that the term includes golf carts.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: “Planned community” has the meaning ascribed to it in NRS 116.075 .
